title: Weather App
description:
Get ready for your day with our accurate and reliable weather app. Check the forecast for your current location or search for a specific city. View hourly and weekly predictions, including temperature, precipitation, and more. Stay ahead of the weather and plan your day with confidence with our easy-to-use app.

Do let me know what you think !

blocks.html:
Overview

Get ready for your day with our accurate and reliable weather app. Check the forecast for your current location or search for a specific city. View hourly and weekly predictions, including temperature, precipitation, and more. Stay ahead of the weather and plan your day with confidence with our easy-to-use app.

Do let me know what you think !
